events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. Unsealed duct joints violate IMC 603.9 sealing requirements and SMACNA standards — mastic or UL 181 foil tape is required at all transverse/longitudinal joints, and cloth duct tape is not an acceptable substitute. Corrective action is to seal all joints per the required seal class before the ductwork is closed in or passed for inspection.
